overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through a dystopian urban slum. The scene features burning wrecked cars, graffiti-covered walls, and a stark contrast between the impoverished street level with debris and the futuristic corporate towers and flying vehicle visible in the hazy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dystopian urban street with burning barricade

events.description: character with red helmet enters frame from left and begins walking down the street

agents.ego_description: character with red hair and helmet walking steadily down the middle of the road past a burning barricade

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the distance on the same road

entered.detail: concrete barrier with red and white stripes, partially damaged with fire and debris behind it
pile of burning rubble and materials behind the barricade
dense network of electrical wires crisscrossing above the street
large rectangular aerial vehicle hovering in the sky
futuristic high-rise corporate buildings visible through haze
run-down two-story structures with corrugated metal and concrete

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit dystopian street with a red and white barricade on the left. The character with red hair walks down the asphalt road toward a distant pedestrian, with power lines overhead and a flying vehicle visible against the hazy skyline of corporate towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with dumpsters and burning wreckage ahead

events.description: character moves from road to sidewalk on the right
burning wrecked cars become clearly visible ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character transitions from the road to the concrete sidewalk, passing large green dumpsters

entered.detail: large industrial waste containers lined up on the sidewalk
damaged blue sedan with open doors and visible fire damage
tall wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
large pile of earth and debris against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto the concrete sidewalk, passing green dumpsters. A blue wrecked car and graffiti-covered wall come into view ahead, with the distant skyline now more centered. The environment shows signs of neglect with trash and debris scattered about.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with burning vehicles and trash piles

events.description: passing the burning blue car with flames visible

agents.ego_description: character walks past the burning wreckage and large piles of trash bags

entered.detail: large mound of black and blue garbage bags piled on the sidewalk
silver van engulfed in flames behind the blue car, partially obscured by smoke

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sidewalk, the character passes the burning blue car and a large pile of trash bags. A burning silver van becomes visible behind the wreckage, with heavy smoke rising against the graffiti-covered wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate view of burning wreckage against graffiti wall

events.description: trash bags temporarily obscure view of the burning van
clear view of the burning silver van and detailed graffiti

agents.ego_description: character moves past the trash pile getting close to the burning van and graffiti wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the trash bags revealing the fully burning silver van in close-up. The graffiti on the concrete wall becomes highly detailed, showing various tags and artwork. The scene ends with an intimate view of the fire and urban decay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit dystopian street that gradually narrows into an intimate view of urban decay and fire. It begins on an asphalt road where a red-haired character walks past a red and white barricade toward a distant pedestrian, with flying vehicles drifting across a hazy skyline of corporate towers. As the character moves onto the concrete sidewalk, the perspective shifts past green dumpsters and scattered debris toward a blue wrecked car and graffiti-covered walls. The scene then intensifies as the camera passes a pile of trash bags and the smoldering blue wreckage to reveal a burning silver van. Finally, the movement closes in on the silver van, bringing the roaring flames and the intricate tags of the graffiti wall into sharp, detailed focus.
